342 J0600B_VRBL_DSCRPTR_SCALE_NUM J0600B_VRBL_DSCRPTR_SCALE_NUM J0600B Pain Intensity Verbal Descriptor Scale Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's intensity of worst pain experienced in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
 1=Mild
 2=Moderate
 3=Severe
 4=Very severe, horrible
 9=Unable to answer
